title: Saved Workspace · e2e-fix
description: Single-user MVP workspace for fixing end-to-end issues inside a named workspace shell.

nodes.title: Task Init
nodes.status: Paste one real GitHub task link to initialize Titan ws + Kinopio + Codex

nodes.title: GitHub
nodes.status: Task-aware GitHub summary · opens the real repo when needed

nodes.title: Titan Terminal
nodes.status: Live SSH terminal into titan WSL task environment
help: Uses the existing titan SSH target instead of a mock local shell.

nodes.title: Ubuntu Workspace Docker
nodes.status: Titan ws docker 状态 + 日志观察窗
help: Reads the current titan ws workspace instead of opening another shell.
Use this to watch current dev container state and recent logs.
Keep Titan Terminal for real shell access when you actually need it.

nodes.title: Task Overview
nodes.status: Live summary of the current task repo and changed files

nodes.title: Task Code
nodes.status: Focused git/code view for the current task instead of a raw file tree
help: Shows changed files and diffs for the current task repo.
Use this before jumping into a terminal to understand what changed.

nodes.title: Kinopio Notes
nodes.status: Spatial notes canvas running from the local Kinopio service
help: This proxies the already-running local Kinopio server into the workspace shell.
Use it as the task note canvas instead of scattering notes across raw files.
